Disconnected XR remoting
No Camera Floor Offset GameObject specified for XR Origin, using attached GameObject.
No Main Camera is found for XR Origin, please assign the Camera field manually.
The StartConnectingToPlayer() function is not supported without enabling the "Holographic Remoting remote app" feature in OpenXR project settings.
No GetDeviceLayoutName() override detected in HP Reverb G2 Controller Profile. Binding path validator for this interaction profile is not as effective. To fix, add GetDeviceLayoutName and GetInteractionProfileType override in this profile.
The Disconnect() function is not supported without enabling the "Holographic Remoting remote app" feature in OpenXR project settings.
Disconnected XR remoting
